steps.title: Create a user on https://palfinder
steps.instruction: Create a user on https://palfinder.ls.manchester.ac.uk/ .

steps.title: Upload the raw sequences of each individual
steps.instruction: Upload the raw sequences of each individual.

steps.title: Check sequences using FastQC with the following configuration:
steps.instruction: Check sequences using FastQC with the following configuration:

steps.title: Short read data
steps.instruction: Short read data : Select raw sequences, both Forward” (R1) and Reverse (R2), separately for each individual.

steps.title: Contaminant list
steps.instruction: Contaminant list : None.

steps.title: Adapter list
steps.instruction: Adapter list : Upload a text file (.txt) containing adapter names and sequences.

steps.title: Clean sequences using Trimmomatic-Galaxy Version 0
steps.instruction: Clean sequences using Trimmomatic-Galaxy Version 0.38.1 with the following configuration:

steps.title: Submodule and limit specifying file
steps.instruction: Submodule and limit specifying file : None.

steps.title: Disable grouping of bases for reads >50 bp
steps.instruction: Disable grouping of bases for reads >50 bp : None.

steps.title: Lower limit on sequence length
steps.instruction: Lower limit on sequence length : Default setting (blank).

steps.title: Length of Kmer
steps.instruction: Length of Kmer : Default setting (7).

steps.title: Single-end or paired-end reads
steps.instruction: Single-end or paired-end reads? Select paired-end (two separate input files).

steps.title: Perform initial ILLUMINACLIP step
steps.instruction: Perform initial ILLUMINACLIP step? Yes.

steps.title: Select standard adapter sequences or provide custom
steps.instruction: Select standard adapter sequences or provide custom? Select Custom.

steps.title: Paste Customized adapter sequences in FASTA format
steps.instruction: Paste Customized adapter sequences in FASTA format.

steps.title: Maximum mismatch count which will still...
steps.instruction: Maximum mismatch count which will still allow a full match to be performed: 2

steps.title: How accurate the match between the...
steps.instruction: How accurate the match between the two 'adapter ligated' reads must befor PE palindrome read alignment: 30.

steps.title: How accurate the match between any adapter etc
steps.instruction: How accurate the match between any adapter etc. sequence must be against a read: 10

steps.title: Minimum length of adapter that needs...
steps.instruction: Minimum length of adapter that needs to be detected (PE specific/palindrome mode): 8.

steps.title: Always keep both reads (PE specific/palindrome mode)
steps.instruction: Always keep both reads (PE specific/palindrome mode)? Yes

steps.title: SLIDINGWINDOW
steps.instruction: SLIDINGWINDOW: 4, 30

steps.title: LEADING
steps.instruction: LEADING: 3

steps.title: TRAILING
steps.instruction: TRAILING: 3

steps.title: MINLEN
steps.instruction: MINLEN : 50

steps.title: Output trimlog file
steps.instruction: Output trimlog file? Yes.

steps.title: Output trimmomatic log messages
steps.instruction: Output trimmomatic log messages? Yes.

steps.title: Run pal_finder in the Galaxy server with the following configuration:
steps.instruction: Run pal_finder in the Galaxy server with the following configuration:

steps.title: Primer prefix
steps.instruction: Primer prefix : Enter a text prefix that will identify each individual.

steps.title: Sequencing platform used to generate data
steps.instruction: Sequencing platform used to generate data : Select the Illumina option.

steps.title: Input Type
steps.instruction: Input Type : Chose the "Pair of datasets" option. Select the paired sequences obtained with Trimmomatic (outputs of step 4.16).

steps.title: Use all reads for microsatellite detection
steps.instruction: Use all reads for microsatellite detection? Yes, as all sequences had been filtered using Trimmomatic.

steps.title: Filters to apply to the pal_finder results
steps.instruction: Filters to apply to the pal_finder results : Selected all the default options.

steps.title: Use PANDAseq to assemble paired-end reads...
steps.instruction: Use PANDAseq to assemble paired-end reads and confirm primer sequencesare present in high-quality assembly : Yes.

steps.title: Minimum number of 2-mer repeat units to detect
steps.instruction: Minimum number of 2-mer repeat units to detect : 6

steps.title: Minimum number of 3-mer repeat units
steps.instruction: Minimum number of 3-mer repeat units : 4

steps.title: Minimum number of 4-mer, 5-mer, and 6-mer repeat units
steps.instruction: Minimum number of 4-mer, 5-mer, and 6-mer repeat units : 3

steps.title: Mispriming library to use
steps.instruction: Mispriming library to use : Default from pal_finder

steps.title: Primer settings to use
steps.instruction: Primer settings to use : Default from pal_finder (except for the minimum and maximum GCpercentage. Set it within a range of 40–60%).

steps.title: Create a user account on an...
steps.instruction: Create a user account on an HPC cluster and ensure sufficient storage space (approximately 100 GB).

steps.title: Download the MiMi program ( https://github
steps.instruction: Download the MiMi program ( https://github.com/graemefox/mimi ).

steps.title: Load the necessary modules for the...
steps.instruction: Load the necessary modules for the program's functionality (Biopython, PANDAseq, MUSCLE, MiMi).

steps.title: Upload the cleaned sequences for each...
steps.instruction: Upload the cleaned sequences for each individual and decompress them on the HPC cluster.

steps.title: Edit the MiMi configuration file to...
steps.instruction: Edit the MiMi configuration file to adjust paths to the MiMi program location and the files uploaded in step 9.

steps.title: Run MiMi. with the follosing command
steps.instruction: Run MiMi. with the follosing command: python MiMi_v0.1.2.py -c 'path to configuration file'

steps.title: Download the output file named
steps.instruction: Download the output file named: MiMi_output_all_loci

steps.title: Open the file MiMi_output_all_loci o n...
steps.instruction: Open the file MiMi_output_all_loci o n an any spreed sheet software.

steps.title: Save the outputs
steps.instruction: Save the outputs

steps.title: Filter monomorphic microsatellites by filtering the...
steps.instruction: Filter monomorphic microsatellites by filtering the column “Size_Range” to loci that have a value greater than 0.

steps.title: From the potential polymorphic microsatellites, filter...
steps.instruction: From the potential polymorphic microsatellites, filter those present in at least 6 of the 8 analyzed individuals (75% of the samples) by selecting the column named “Samples_containing_raw_reads_(respectively)” with 6 or more samples. And allergic richness of Ar = 3 or higher, by filtering the column “Alleles_present‘ with three or more alleles.
